items.question: How do I find products near me?
items.answer: Select your location in the header to see products and services available in your area.

items.question: Is it free to create an account?
items.answer: Yes! Creating a buyer account is completely free.

items.question: How do I become a vendor?
items.answer: Click Start Your Business and follow the simple registration process.

items.question: Are payments secure?
items.answer: All transactions are processed through secure, encrypted payment channels.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started

items.question: How much does it cost to join?
items.answer: Creating a vendor account is free. We only charge a small commission on successful sales.

items.question: Can I sell both products and services?
items.answer: Yes! Choose Product Business, Service Business, or Both during setup.

items.question: How do I get paid?
items.answer: Payments are processed securely and transferred to your account regularly.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Most vendors complete setup and list their first item within 15 minutes.

items.question: Do I need technical skills?
items.answer: Not at all. Our platform is designed for everyone.
